Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It’s a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Miracles: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: A country boy becomes the head of a gang through the purchase of some lucky roses from an old lady. He and a singer at the gang's nightclub try to do a good deed for the old lady when her daughter comes to visit.

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Breaker! Breaker!
programme.desc: Truck driver searches for his brother, who has disappeared in a town run by a corrupt judge.

programme.title: Hyena Road
programme.desc: Three different men, three different worlds, three different wars – all stand at the crossroads of modern warfare. It's a murky world in which they must save lives - but all is not as it seems

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: THE COLD LIGHT OF DAY is an adrenaline fuelled action thriller starring British star Henry Cavill (Superman: Man of Steel, Immortals) alongside Hollywood action legend Bruce Willis (Die Hard) and Sigourney Weaver (Avatar).

Based on actual events - A group of 5 people find themselves trapped in an elevator in the World Trade Center's North Tower on 9/11. They work together, never giving up hope, to try to escape before the unthinkable happens.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: In this tightly crafted action thriller, a single mother struggling to survive agrees to run black market medical supplies in her legendary pick-up truck, "Night Train", with the FBI in hot pursuit.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A group of competitors participates in a wild, illegal car race across America, where the drivers use every dirty trick in the book to win.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Salt and fire
programme.desc: A scientist blames the head of a large company for an ecological disaster in South America. But when a volcano begins to show signs of erupting, they must unite to avoid a disaster.

programme.title: There Be Dragons
programme.desc: Two childhood friends become separated by the political turmoil of pre-war Spain only to find themselves on opposite sides when the war erupts. One becomes a priest, the other is an activist who becomes a spy for the fascist movement. As the battles are waged, the characters' lives collide...

programme.title: The Old Way
programme.desc: An old gunslinger and his daughter must face the consequences of his past, when the son of a man he murdered years ago arrives to take his revenge.

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: Martin Parker (Scott Adkins), a highly trained former DEA agent, is hiding in the witness protection program in London with his young daughter, Carly. His world is turned upside down when a group of thugs break into his home looking for hidden contraband.

programme.title: Duchess
programme.desc: Duchess, a small-time crook, tries to enter the treacherous underworld of diamond trafficking and ends up left for dead when a deal goes wrong. Determined to seek retribution, she launches into an unwavering pursuit for vengeance.

programme.title: Supercell
programme.desc: Aspiring storm-chaser William is determined to continue his father's legacy by chasing the most dangerous supercell tornado ever seen.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Instrument of War
programme.desc: Instrument Of War is an harrowing yet uplifting true story about survival against seemingly impossible odds. When U.S. B-24 bomber pilot Clair Cline is shot down and captured in northern Germany, one war ends and another begins -- to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Enemy Within
programme.desc: When a Japanese fighter pilot crash-lands on the tiny remote Hawaiian island of Ni'ihau, he is met with courtesy and traditional Hawaiian hospitality from the locals.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Iron Fury
programme.desc: In 1944, a young lieutenant leads a courageous group of Russian soldiers in a German POW camp, plotting a daring escape from captivity in a half-dest

programme.title: Salt and fire
programme.desc: A scientist blames the head of a large company for an ecological disaster in South America. But when a volcano begins to show signs of erupting, they must unite to avoid a disaster.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It’s a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: Clary Fray thinks she is just an ordinary teenager living in Brooklyn, but everything changes one night when in a downtown club she encounters the mysterious and charismatic Jace , and witnesses a shocking murder.

programme.title: Speed Kills
programme.desc: Based on the true story of one of Miami’s most notorious businessmen and gangster's, SPEED KILLS is a high-octane thriller, described as “The Wolf of Wall Street on Water.”

programme.title: Crossfire
programme.desc: Jonas ‘Malo’ Moldanado (Curtis ‘50 Cent’ Jackson) is a fresh faced recruit in the NYPD, taken under the wing of a corrupt police chief Sarcone (Robert DeNiro) Malo get dragged deeper and deeper into a world of drugs, violence and crime.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S2:E5 Greg Dreams of Jeannie & the Amazing Squirrel
programme.desc: Greg’s obsession with 60’s pop-culture has literally taken over his home. Kelly’s life revolves around her pet squirrel, Sugar Bush and his photo appearances

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Kimberly takes hundreds of laxatives a day in an attempt to lose weight. Meanwhile, Bianca prefers to eat pottery and cigarette ashes instead of food.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: “My Strange Addiction” tells the story of people who just can't stop doing very strange things, including a compulsive tanner, a runner, a shopper and a chalk eater.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S2:E1 Wears Diapers / Eats Dryer Sheets
programme.desc: For Riley, there's nothing like the comfort of wearing a warm, wet diaper. She lives as an adult baby to escape the stresses of life. And Charmissa chews on dryer sheets for up to 10 hours a day.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S1:E3 House of Dolls & Flashback to the '50s
programme.desc: Bob and Lizzie share their home with over 250 love dolls, and love to flaunt their collection around town. Doris Mayday is in her 20’s and stuck in the 50’s. Everything about Doris is from 1950.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S1:E4 The Cat's House & My Oval Office
programme.desc: Frances and Bob share their house with nine felines who they raise like children. Ron is obsessed with U.S. presidents. He’s even built a replica of the oval office in his home.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Stanley, 31, has been obsessed with being an adult baby for the past 18 years. Every day he wears footie pajamas, eats baby food, wears a diaper and sleeps in a crib.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Chad Michael is a mannequin fanatic. His collection of over 300 mannequins has taken over every room of his house. Zizi has 35 carrot tattoos and she’s decorated every room with a carrot theme.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Kristie has eaten dirt every day for the last 30 years, consuming more than five tons since her addiction began. Meanwhile, Ayanna is addicted to growing her toenails.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S3:E6 Sniffs Pine Cleaner / Road Kill Addict
programme.desc: Jillian is addicted to smelling pine cleaner and can't go more than 15 minutes without a fix, using up to six bottles a week. Scott is obsessed with picking up dead animals from the road.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Carrie has been addicted to drinking her urine for four years. She drinks about 80 ounces a day with belief it has helped treat her cancer. Can Carrie's daughters persuade her to see a physician?

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S3:E8 Drinks Gasoline / Carries Doll Head
programme.desc: Shannon is addicted to gasoline, drinking about 15 teaspoons every day. Lacey has been carrying and smelling her doll head "Suzie Q" everywhere she goes.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Ketchup or Mustard? Barry owns the world’s largest mustard collection numbering 5,500 bottles from 80 countries. Ralph’s rare collection of Ketchup bottles includes a patent bottle from 1891.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Bugs have been a part of David’s daily diet for over twelve years, watch as he braces himself to eat his most venomous bug yet. Kelly’s daily diet consists of food solely gathered from the dumpster.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S2:E8 Star Chaser & the Little Merman
programme.desc: Eric is obsessed with Mermaids and has transformed himself into a real-life Merman. Vanessa is so obsessed with meeting celebrities that she spends all day searching them out.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S5:E5 Justin Bieber Look-a-like / Makeup Eater
programme.desc: Toby, a 33-year-old man who's spent over $100,000 on surgery to look like Justin Bieber and 22-year-old Brittoni, who's addicted to eating makeup.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S5:E6 Addicted to a Doll / Eats Plastic Bags
programme.desc: Robert, a 23-year-old man who's addicted to eating plastic newspaper bags, an addition so intense, that he goes days without food. Catherine, a 48-year-old woman whose best friend is a doll.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S1:E1 Eats Toilet Paper / Blow Dryer
programme.desc: “My Strange Addiction” tells the story of people who just can't stop doing very strange things, including a compulsive tanner, a runner, a shopper and a chalk eater.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S1:E2 Married to a Doll / Picking My Scabs
programme.desc: Davecat has been married to his synthetic wife for 10 years. Meanwhile, Rachael hopes that her compulsive scab picking will stop by her wedding day.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection takes you inside the lives of extreme collectors who have taken holiday decorating to the max. For these obsessed collectors, it's Christmas year round.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S2:E1 Love Bunnies & World's Strongest Family
programme.desc: The Best family is so obsessed with their own strength that they spend countless hours lifting weights. Candace and Steve's collection of bunny items has reached nearly 30,000 pieces.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S2:E2 This Little Piggy & All Dolled Up
programme.desc: Sharon’s collection of pig items has exceeded 6,000 and adorns almost every square inch of her home. Rebecca’s obsession with Barbie dolls includes styling her own hair and wardrobe to match her dolls.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: While battling her addiction to eating couch cushions, Adele has destroyed 7 couches and 2 chairs. Meanwhile, Lauren is more comfortable in her fur suit than in her own skin.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: April's addiction to her puppets has gotten so strong she can't go anywhere without them. Debbie is severely allergic to cats, but has over twenty of them, leaving her in isolation.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S1:E9 Can't Stop Cleaning / Love Rocks
programme.desc: Cyntrelle dropped out of high school because of her addiction to cleaning. Belinda's obsession with rocks has taken over her life, with more than 100,000 scattered around her home.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Josh has eaten more than 250 light bulbs. But is he really addicted to the attention that he receives? Candice thinks dark skin is ugly and has resorted to using dangerous bleaching creams.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S1:E8 Airline Addict & Crazy for Capybaras
programme.desc: Anthony has been collecting aviation memorabilia since he was 5. Melanie is crazy about her pet capybara, Gari, taking him for walks and teaching him tricks.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Ever since she was twelve Crystle has been obsessed with eating household cleanser. Samantha is addicted to tanning and visits multiple tanning salons in order to get her fix.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: 19-year-old Tempestt eats detergent up to seven times a day, not to mention the soap she eats in the shower. Meanwhile, Jeff is addicted to strongman competitions training up to six hours a day.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Lauren was once addicted to drugs and alcohol, but now is addicted to body-building. Rhonda has been addicted to sucking her thumb ever since her parents divorced when she was a child.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Showcases a woman addicted to shoes, while another is addicted to pulling her hair and eating the follicle.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: My Collection Obsession takes you deep inside the world of four of the country’s most obsessed collectors each taking their material obsession to jaw-dropping extremes.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Pat and Joe are passionate about their extreme collection of over 5,000 infamous kid dolls. Kitty Kay Sera is completely obsessed with the color pink. She even wears pink clothes and eats pink food.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Janet has spent the last 30 years collecting over 5000 famous mouse memorabilia items and her collection holds the world record. Tamis has been obsessed with wearing wigs for the past 20 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S2:E1 Wears Diapers / Eats Dryer Sheets

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Theresa has more than 60 pet hairless rats that are taking over her apartment. Jazz has been growing her fingernails for 22 years. Her longest nail is two feet long, and she calls them her children.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S2:E3 Gas Sniffer / Teddy Bear Obsession
programme.desc: For more than 30 years, Theresa has been addicted to smelling gasoline. Meanwhile, former drug-addict Krista has 12 'children' -- all of which are teddy bears.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S2:E4 Eats Drywall / Shower Drain Hair Collector
programme.desc: Evan has spent the last six years sneaking into bathrooms because he is addicted to collecting shower drain hair. And Nicole, has spent the last seven years secretly eating drywall.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.sub-title: S1:E3 House of Dolls & Flashback to the '50s

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Chad Michael is a mannequin fanatic. His collection of over 300 mannequins has taken over every room of his house. Zizi has 35 carrot tattoos and she’s decorated every room with a carrot theme.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Tom is so addicted to cycling that he spends at least six hours a day riding. Divya loves spending her time searching for dead animals on the side of the road and stuffing them.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Theresa has been eating rocks for more than 20 years and can't stop. Meanwhile, Tamara carries around her childhood pillow Boo everywhere she goes.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S2:E7 Bathes in Bleach / Eats Plastic
programme.desc: Kailyn has eaten plastic every day for more than eleven years, consuming more than 150 pounds. Meanwhile, Gloria, 28, has taken her addiction to bleach to the extreme by bathing in it daily.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: Casie has been so shocked by the sudden death of her husband, Shawn, that she takes his urn everywhere she goes. But she has now started eating his ashes.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.desc: In this one-hour special, we revisit six of our addicts whose stories shocked the world. Tune in for exclusive never before seen footage in this special episode.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: The Smith family has a collection of 213 stuffed and mounted animals throughout their home. Michelle’s obsession with trolls threatens her relationship with her family.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S3:E1 Eats Cat Food / Smells Moth Balls
programme.desc: Mary has taken her addiction to cat food to the extreme, consuming 900 cat treats and several cans of food every day. Meanwhile, Alicia has been addicted to smelling mothballs for 15 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S3:E2 Drinks Nail Polish / Ear Digger
programme.desc: Bertha has been drinking up to five bottles of nail polish every day for the past five years but her family is worried she's doing permanent damage to her health. Jamie can't stop digging in her ears

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S3:E3 Dating My Car / Baby Powder Addict
programme.desc: Nathaniel has been in a relationship with his car for nearly five years, taking it out on dates, buying it gifts, and even getting intimate with it. Jaye has been addicted to snorting baby powder.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S3:E4 Addicted to My Breasts / Tape Eater
programme.desc: Sheyla has spent $250,000 on 22 breast enlargement surgeries to achieve her 38KKK bust size, despite suffering a severe infection from her recent implants. Andrea is addicted to eating adhesive tape.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession
programme.desc: Fred and Robert have a rare collection of vintage washing machines. They’ve over $40,000 to compile this one-of-a-kind collection. Lynn has created over 1,800 life-like vinyl newborn dolls.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S4:E2 Extreme Hair / Addicted to Bee Stings
programme.desc: Asha hasn't cut her 21-foot long hair in nearly a quarter century and spends up to six hours a day grooming her ten-pound locks. Margaret has stung herself over 50,000 times with bees.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S4:E3 Addicted to Inflatables / Butt Injection Addict

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: S4:E4 In Love With Balloons / Face Mask Eater
programme.desc: Julius has been sexually attracted to balloons for decades and keeps more than fifty thousand in his home at all times. Natasha eats entire jars of clay face masks every day.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar sets out to help a young couple's cantankerous Chihuahua, whose recent blindness makes him increasingly hostile to be around. And later, a family makes a desperate plea to Cesar to help them rein in their fast-growing and overexcited Belgian Malinois before he becomes too tough to tame.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar works with a Mexican breed close to his heart when he rehabilitates twin dogs whose over-excited behavior has put their owner at risk of eviction from her apartment building. Later, an actress turns to Cesar for help with an overprotective pint-sized pooch.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar helps a family of seven with their young Rottweiler, who's grown aggressive and territorial after a burglary at the family home. With help from his own pack, Cesar instructs the pet parents on techniques to exert leadership behavior and reestablish themselves atop the pack.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar helps a fearful family, which is still holding on to the pain of losing their first dog in a tragic accident, deal with their two-year-old Black Lab's similarly aggressive personality. And later, a young girl looks to Cesar for help when her emotional support puppy is causing chaos.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar helps a young couple's sensitive Australian cattle dog, whose severe separation anxiety has held hostage the lives of his pet parents. Later, Cesar attempts to calm a blind Lhasa Apso, who lacks basic hygiene and has almost become too hostile for his owners to provide his needed eye care.

programme.title: Cesar Millan's Leader of the Pack
programme.desc: Well-meaning online dog adoptions can lead to severe problems -- dog and owner compatibility is never assured. This is the story of a greyhound called Amigo that didn't find the right home.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. programme.title: Rediscovering China

programme.title: Ding Porcelain Firing
programme.desc: In ancient times, skilled craftsmen combined clay with fire and, using nothing more than their hands and wisdom, created the history of porcelain.A thousand years ago, at the time of the Northern Song Dynasty, a type of porcelain was produced that stood out for its exquisite quality, elegant coloring and beautiful patterns. This was Ding porcelain, and it became a favorite at the imperial court. However, within 200 years, amid the chaos of constant warfare, the art of making it was lost. The dazzling white light of the Ding kilns had faded, seemingly forever. And yet, 800 years later, that light has been reignited.

programme.title: Ding Porcelain Firing
programme.desc: In ancient times, skilled craftsmen combined clay with fire and, using nothing more than their hands and wisdom, created the history of porcelain.A thousand years ago, at the time of the Northern Song Dynasty, a type of porcelain was produced that stood out for its exquisite quality, elegant coloring and beautiful patterns. programme.title: A Touch of Speed: The Art of Wing Chun
programme.desc: Uncover the principles of Wing Chun, a unique Chinese martial art renowned for its efficiency and directness. This program explores its legendary origins, core concepts like the center line theory, and its practical application in close-quarters combat. Witness the subtle power and intellectual depth of this sophisticated fighting system.

programme.title: A Touch of Speed: The Art of Wing Chun
programme.desc: Uncover the principles of Wing Chun, a unique Chinese martial art renowned for its efficiency and directness. This program explores its legendary origins, core concepts like the center line theory, and its practical application in close-quarters combat. Witness the subtle power and intellectual depth of this sophisticated fighting system.

programme.title: Quyang Stone Carving
programme.desc: Quyang is known as a hometown of Chinese carving. Quyang's stone carving works are popular around different parts of China, thus also exported to over 100 countries and regions worldwide. The style of Quyang stone carving both carries the mysterious and rough spirit of the Wei Dynasty and the natural and graceful forms of the Tang and Song dynasties. It reflects the life experiences and live philosophies of local artisans. Each statue's showcases unique oriental aesthetics.

programme.title: Quyang Stone Carving
programme.desc: Quyang is known as a hometown of Chinese carving. Quyang's stone carving works are popular around different parts of China, thus also exported to over 100 countries and regions worldwide. The style of Quyang stone carving both carries the mysterious and rough spirit of the Wei Dynasty and the natural and graceful forms of the Tang and Song dynasties. It reflects the life experiences and live philosophies of local artisans. Each statue's showcases unique oriental aesthetics.

programme.title: Grand Song of the Dong — Natural Oriental Harmony
programme.desc: The Grand Song of the Dong is a polyphonic folk singing tradition of the Dong ethnic group. Performers from several villages gather together to sing, unaccompanied.The songs, which describe the history, beliefs, customs, and emotions of the Dong people, are an important part of their cultural identity and contribute significantly to their social cohesion.Generally sung in the Dong language, which has no written form, they are passed on orally from one generation to the next. Classified into various genres—including narrative and love songs, drinking and funeral songs—they are often accompanied by clapping, stomping, and dancing.Sung on occasions such as festivals, weddings, and...

programme.title: Foodwise: Chongqing
programme.desc: Welcome to Chongqing, China's largest city. Located in the country's southwest, it straddles two mighty rivers and is famed for its extraordinary skyline, with high-rises mushrooming out of the hills and vertigo-inducing bridges.But Tianran He and Angela Fu are here for the food: From xiaomian noodles and Jianghu cuisine to the city's most famous dish: Chongqing hotpot, our hosts take on the spicy, numbing and scintillating aromas of Chongqing cuisine. We promise you: Chongqing will electrify your senses and tantalise your taste buds.

programme.title: Foodwise: Chongqing
programme.desc: Welcome to Chongqing, China's largest city. Located in the country's southwest, it straddles two mighty rivers and is famed for its extraordinary skyline, with high-rises mushrooming out of the hills and vertigo-inducing bridges.But Tianran He and Angela Fu are here for the food: From xiaomian noodles and Jianghu cuisine to the city's most famous dish: Chongqing hotpot, our hosts take on the spicy, numbing and scintillating aromas of Chongqing cuisine. We promise you: Chongqing will electrify your senses and tantalise your taste buds.

programme.title: Foodwise: Veggie Beijing
programme.desc: Beijing is a 3000-year old metropolis home to a dizzying array of culinary traditions, not least of which is vegetarian cuisine. For Beijingers, eating vegetarian is the best way to welcome spring. In this episode, Tianran and Angela take up the challenge: From simple home cooking utilizing spring flowers and leaves, to the extravagant mock-meat masterpieces of imperial cuisine, and international dishes well-known to the vegetarian community, our hosts discover a plethora of plant-based options to be found amongst the historic alleys and skyscrapers of China's capital.

programme.title: Foodwise: Veggie Beijing
programme.desc: Beijing is a 3000-year old metropolis home to a dizzying array of culinary traditions, not least of which is vegetarian cuisine. For Beijingers, eating vegetarian is the best way to welcome spring. In this episode, Tianran and Angela take up the challenge: From simple home cooking utilizing spring flowers and leaves, to the extravagant mock-meat masterpieces of imperial cuisine, and international dishes well-known to the vegetarian community, our hosts discover a plethora of plant-based options to be found amongst the historic alleys and skyscrapers of China's capital.

programme.title: Foodwise: Great Walls of Beijing
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is a popular tourist destination, but did you know that in Beijing, it's where locals go to unwind? From feasts of tofu made using well-water and fish caught fresh from the reservoir, to bubbling cauldrons of thinly-sliced lamb, the hilly suburbs of Beijing are home to some of the city's best-loved weekend escapes - and they're all by the foot of the Great Wall.

programme.title: Foodwise: Great Walls of Beijing
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is a popular tourist destination, but did you know that in Beijing, it's where locals go to unwind? From feasts of tofu made using well-water and fish caught fresh from the reservoir, to bubbling cauldrons of thinly-sliced lamb, the hilly suburbs of Beijing are home to some of the city's best-loved weekend escapes - and they're all by the foot of the Great Wall.

programme.title: Foodwise: How to Order Chinese Food
programme.desc: How do you order Chinese food? What's the best way to pair dishes? And what's up with the naming system? In this episode, hosts Tianran and Eva will give you a crash course on everything from deciphering the menu and choosing the right restaurant, to pairing dishes according to color, aroma, taste, and form, so that by the end of the show, you too can feast your friends like a pro.

programme.title: Foodwise: How to Order Chinese Food
programme.desc: How do you order Chinese food? What's the best way to pair dishes? And what's up with the naming system? In this episode, hosts Tianran and Eva will give you a crash course on everything from deciphering the menu and choosing the right restaurant, to pairing dishes according to color, aroma, taste, and form, so that by the end of the show, you too can feast your friends like a pro.

programme.title: Foodwise: Eat Like Confucius
programme.desc: "Foodwise" host Tianran He explores the ancient town of Qufu, the birthplace of Confucius. Together with a 75th generation descendant of the sage himself, they explore one of Confucius' lifelong pursuits: To cultivate oneself for the betterment of others. From the sophisticated cooking techniques and dining etiquette of Confucian cuisine, which was used for banqueting emperors and aristocrats, to getting hands on with street food and local delicacies, Tianran explores how Confucius' ideals have permeated through modern day life in Qufu.

programme.title: Foodwise: Eat Like Confucius

programme.title: Wild Wonders Ep.2
programme.desc: China's vast land features extraordinary geological diversity and climate zones. Home to 5,000 years of civilization and 1.4 billion people, it sustains the world's second-largest economy while sheltering over 2,000 nature reserves. This documentary spotlights China's natural heritage for tomorrow's possibilities.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking & optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn’t have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show, when hot-headed Chef Stephen is dropped into Kelly’s life as a last minute replacement host.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Greener Grass
programme.desc: GREENER GRASS is a hilariously deadpan hellscape of competitive suburbia with a boldly stylized absurdist chain of events that unfurls with increasing fervour after one soccer mom gifts another her infant daughter just to be polite.

programme.title: Father of Invention
programme.desc: Robert Axle (Kevin Spacey of AMERICAN BEAUTY, HORRIBLE BOSSES), an eccentric inventor-turned-egomaniacal-infomercial-guru, loses it all when one of his inventions maims thousands of customers.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back In Business
programme.desc: The buzz is back in Barbershop 2. Calvin is struggling to keep his father's shop alive, this time against urban developers looking to replace "mom & pop" establishments with name-brand chains. The world changes, but some things never go out of style...

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: The Middle Ages may never be the same after street smart Jamal Walker falls into a moat at the Medieval World theme park and finds himself transported back in time.

programme.title: Everything Must Go
programme.desc: After delivering an inspiring presentation to his sales staff, Nick is fired for falling off the wagon one last time. He returns home to discover his wife has left him, changed the locks on their suburban home and dumped all his possessions out on the front yard.

programme.title: Walk of Shame
programme.desc: After losing an audition for her dream job, Meghan Miles, a Los Angeles TV news anchor, goes out for an uncharacteristic night of partying.

programme.title: Pushing Tin
programme.desc: Fueled by caffeine and machismo, a rivalry ensues between Nick and Russell. The one-upmanship becomes a contest of wits and wills, where stress is the great equalizer and bravado is the lowest common denominator...

programme.title: Youth in Revolt
programme.desc: While his trailer trash parents teeter on the edge of divorce, Nick Twisp sets his sights on dream girl Sheeni Saunders, hoping that she'll be the one to take away his virginity.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.

programme.title: The Bounce Back
programme.desc: A relationship guru and best-selling author finds himself falling for the licensed therapist who questions his methods.

programme.title: Hudson
programme.desc: After his mother’s death, Hudson, a reclusive but charming man, embarks on a journey with his distant cousin to scatter his mother’s ashes in the Hudson Valley region of New York.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner’s deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Electric Jesus
programme.desc: When a promoter sells a Christian metal band on the promise of a summer tour in 1986, their desire to "make Jesus famous" meets the complexities and confusion of personal ambition, youthful zeal, lifelong friendships, and first love.

programme.title: Bogus
programme.desc: When a young boy's mother dies, he invents an imaginary friend to accompany him to his new home far away. How can a boy be lonely with a gentle giant named Bogus? Gerard Depardieu and Whoopi Goldberg star together for the first time in this warmhearted tale of magic and fantasy.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: It was a stroke of genius, but now the perfect crime is turning into a perfect disaster.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he’s white.

programme.title: Everything Must Go
programme.desc: After delivering an inspiring presentation to his sales staff, Nick is fired for falling off the wagon one last time. He returns home to discover his wife has left him, changed the locks on their suburban home and dumped all his possessions out on the front yard.

programme.title: Brighton
programme.desc: Derek, Dinah, Dave and Doreen are two retired couples who return to the seaside resort of Brighton after an absence of 40 years in an uproarious attempt to relive their youth. A chance meeting brings up old rivalries and lead to a hilarious clash between the old world and the new.

programme.title: Lemon
programme.desc: Isaac is a man in free fall immobilized by mediocrity. His career is going nowhere. His blind girlfriend of ten years is leaving him. And his overbearing family doesn't help matters. What did he do to deserve this? Things were supposed to work out differently for him. Isaac Lachmann had big dreams.

programme.title: Cheap Thrills
programme.desc: Craig loses his low-wage job. He heads to a bar and encounters an old friend. The two are roped into a round of drinks by a wealthy couple who engages them in a series of innocent dares in exchange for money. It seems like easy and much needed money, but how far are they willing to go for money?

programme.title: Greener Grass
programme.desc: GREENER GRASS is a hilariously deadpan hellscape of competitive suburbia with a boldly stylized absurdist chain of events that unfurls with increasing fervour after one soccer mom gifts another her infant daughter just to be polite.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin (Ice Cube) is a would-be entrepreneur with big plans...and running his family's barbershop isn't one of them. But when he impulsively sells the shop to a shady loan shark, he soon realizes just how important the neighborhood parlor is to him... and just how far he'll go to get it back!

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he’s white.

programme.title: Bite Me
programme.desc: When Sarah, a real-life vampire, gets audited by the IRS, the last thing she expects to get out of it is a date. But James, her hopelessly romantic IRS agent, thinks she’s other-worldly.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: It was a stroke of genius, but now the perfect crime is turning into a perfect disaster.

programme.title: The Winning Season
programme.desc: Sam Rockwell and fast rising star Emma Roberts, comes the hilarious story of a washed up basketball coach who must learn to overcome his love of booze.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner’s deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Father of Invention
programme.desc: Robert Axle (Kevin Spacey of AMERICAN BEAUTY, HORRIBLE BOSSES), an eccentric inventor-turned-egomaniacal-infomercial-guru, loses it all when one of his inventions maims thousands of customers.

programme.title: Hudson
programme.desc: After his mother’s death, Hudson, a reclusive but charming man, embarks on a journey with his distant cousin to scatter his mother’s ashes in the Hudson Valley region of New York.

programme.title: Yes, God, Yes
programme.desc: Growing up in the Midwest in the early OOs, sixteen-year-old Alice has always been a good Catholic. But when an innocent AOL chat turns racy, she discovers masturbation and is overwhelmed with guilt. Seeking redemption, she attends a mysterious religious retreat to try and suppress her urges...

programme.title: I'm Still Here
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Casey Affleck takes a turn behind the camera to document a tumultuous year in the life of fellow Oscar-winning actor, Joaquin Phoenix, as he announces his retirement from a successful film career and sets off to reinvent himself as a hip-hop musician.

programme.title: Space Colonies
programme.desc: Space colonization may start with the Moon. Getting material there may be relatively simple. But risks exist.

programme.title: Space Colonies
programme.desc: SpaceX believes that humanity can colonize Mars within our lifetime. Is this goal reasonable? Is it doable?

programme.title: TechTalk
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Digital Music, Robots, Cyber Crime, & Art
programme.desc: See what makes Israel ‘The Start-up Nation,’ including AI robots, digital art, and other technologies.

programme.title: Hubble: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: In this beautiful show, viewers get an inside look at the challenges of operating the Hubble telescope.

programme.title: Voyage of Curiosity
programme.desc: Curiosity's robot rover exploring Mars is now known as one of the greatest achievements in space exploration.

programme.title: Our Roots, Our Future
programme.desc: Scientists are studying root growth. Roots may help solve climate change and protect the environment.

programme.title: Earth: Making of a Planet
programme.desc: The history of our planet proceeds from birth to the unique complexity of its land, sea, atmosphere, and life.

programme.title: Exoplanets: Thousands of New Worlds
programme.desc: Are we alone? Scientists challenge traditional planetary science to seek and observe worlds called exoplanets.

programme.title: TechTalk
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Work Dating, Coded Lego & Robot Companions
programme.desc: Meet innovative tech including ElliQ, the AI robot, which is designed to engage with and protect the elderly.

programme.title: TechTalk
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Start-Up Incubators & Ethical Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: TechTalk host Jonny meets Esther to learn how robots and human beings can live together in endless harmony.

programme.title: TechTalk
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Iron Dome, Reporters & Touch Technology
programme.desc: Meet creators of the Iron Dome Missile Defense System and see how they moved into environmental technology.

programme.title: TechTalk
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Crowd Funding, Virtual Reality Medicine & Assisted Renting
programme.desc: Jon Medved of OurCrowd talks about crowdfunding for tech; then see some cutting-edge VR tools for physicians.

programme.title: TechTalk
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Medical Cannabis Technology & Innovation
programme.desc: We visit CannaTech, a medical cannabis conference for technology entrepreneurs, to examine tech innovations.

programme.title: TechTalk
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Flying Cars, Holographic Food & Autonomous Firefighters
programme.desc: Meet an inventor of flying cars, rescue vehicles, and taxis, plus 3D holographic food menus and ordering.

programme.title: TechTalk
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Attack of the Drones, Planes, & Car Hackings
programme.desc: Learn how technology can protect our privacy, and witness how connected cars are hacked while being driven.

programme.title: The Longest Day: Climate Change in Real Time
programme.desc: Soon, half the world's population will lack access to fresh water. For millions across Asia, this is true now.

programme.title: The Longest Day: Climate Change in Real Time
programme.desc: By 2050, rising sea levels will flood 200 million people’s homes around Earth. See how many are coping now.

programme.title: The Longest Day: Climate Change in Real Time
programme.desc: Get climate choices wrong, and you can fuel climate change and environmental problems all across the globe.

programme.title: Dust Storm
programme.desc: We investigate dust storm causes, and how to predict them and lessen their impact.

programme.title: Expedition Antarctica
programme.desc: A hardy research crew seeks clues about the fate of our planet beneath the icy waters of the Antarctic Ocean.

programme.title: Moon Shots
programme.desc: With rare archive footage, this stunning one-hour special brings scientific history to life.

programme.title: Shockwave
programme.desc: A powerful earthquake and tsunami will some day devastate the Pacific Northwest. What can we do to prepare?

programme.title: Killer Asteroid
programme.desc: Can a new generation of cutting-edge space missions face the ultimate natural disaster?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake (CASE OF RUTH LÉGERET) - On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows? Clue after clue, the Swiss police's investigation would revolve around an environment of family jealousy and financial greed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: September 16 2005. The lifeless body of Audrey Jouannet, 24, is found hidden under the bed in her small apartment in Soisy-sur-Seine. It soon becomes apparent that the young woman has been tortured at length before being strangled. But surprisingly, though the highly meticulous murderer has taken care to leave no sign of his passage, the autopsy reveals traces of sperm on the victim. It will take all of the investigators' intuition to pierce the mystery of this heinous crime...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want the adorable hairdresser of Saint-Martin-d'Ablois dead. During the investigation, the work of profilers will enable them to draw a very precise portrait of the murderer...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: After an ordinary dinner, Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell suffer severe abdominal pains.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Nelly Crémel, 39, leaves her home to go jogging... never to return. Eight days later, after a vast search campaign, her body is found. There's no doubt that it's murder. The case soon ignites public opinion, even inflaming passions at the highest level of the state. The clues lead investigators on a number of trails, from the shadows of the French secret service to a manhunt for a possible sex maniac, in a case of murder most foul.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death. At several points during this extraordinary enquiry, police will feel they're holding the culprit... It will take them ten years to finally shed light on this particularly violent crime.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. A veritable execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of the quiet family man. Yet behind the appearances, the investigation gradually reveals all the hate and resentment that revolved around the victim.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! An extensive search is undertaken but the woman cannot be found. What has happened to Adeline Piet? The investigation spans several years and experiences many twists.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: The corpse of Priscillia Ciatti, 14, is discovered by the side of a field, a few hundred metres from her family home. The teenager has been stabbed sixty times with a knife and -an extra sordid detail - a devil mask is found next to her body. Was Priscillia the victim of a prowler? A serial killer? A maniac inspired by a horror movie? Investigators soon find that the young girl felt she was being watched, and even threatened...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: In the early hours of the morning, Mathilde Croguennec, 18, attending "Teknival" in Brittany, is found at the foot of a tree with her throat cut. Investigators face the task of finding the killer from among the 43,000 participants of this huge open-air festival of electronic music, where drink and drugs are consumed in abundance. An unusual investigation that leads the police down a number of false avenues.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written "DIRTY RAPIST". Yet Jean-Raymond Blatti was never charged with sexual assault. Over the course of the investigation, this inscription will appear as one of the many mysteries of this case which is particularly rich in twists and turns.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On July 19th 2004, the naked and tied up body of a woman is recovered in the Ourcq canal in Fresnes-sur-Marne. The victim is impossible to identify.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On April 3th 2003, Chantal Ternik, a 48 year old housewife, is discovered hanged in her house of Sanary-sur-Mer, in Var.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On March 28th 2013, the burnt body of Anne Barbot, 38 years old, is discovered in a forest of Maine-et-Loire.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On May 17th 2005, a body is discovered in a forest of Sucy-en-Brie; Christophe Belle, 40 years old, a renowned pastry cook.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: The disturbing missing case in Paris of a four year old.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On October 13th 1996, the body of young Angélique Dumetz, 18 years old, is recovered down a ditch in Oise forest. An important clue is found on the crime scene.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On February 23th 2017, policemen are alerted of the disapearrance of Brigitte Troadec, her husband Pascal, and their children Sébastien and Charlotte.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.desc: At age 19, on a missionary trip to a clinic in Brazil, Kristen Bell helped to deliver two babies. The experience ignited her nurturing nature, which endures today.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.desc: Shaquille O’Neal went from being poor and bullied – and becoming a bully himself – to fame in the NBA. The greatest influence on Shaq’s life was his step-father.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Samuel L. Jackson & LaTanya Richardson Jackson
programme.desc: At age 20 Samuel L. Jackson served as an usher at Martin Luther King’s funeral. Jackson and his wife LaTanya have fought for civil rights around the world.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.desc: LeVar Burton entered the seminary at 13 years old. But after deciding the church didn’t have the answers to his questions about life he changed his focus to theater.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.desc: Joe Namath grew up in Beaver Falls, Pennsylvania. After his parent’s divorce, Joe turns to sports.

programme.desc: Jimmy Donaldson, aka MrBeast, is the world’s first digital philanthropist. Jimmy built a viral video empire based on the joy he gets from helping others.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: NASA's Parker Probe Plus is on a mission to learn more about the Sun -- flying through dangerous radiation to become the closest spaceship to orbit our Sun.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Opportunity: A Life on Mars
programme.desc: This year we said goodbye to one of our most intrepid planetary explorers, the Opportunity rover. Take a look back at its storied 15-year mission on Mars.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: A non-profit organization established in 2011 is aiming to land the first Israeli spacecraft on the Moon. This is the story of their attempt and the excitement of being the first private company to have a spacecraft launched with the intention of going to and landing on the moon.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Modern Day Killer Asteroid
programme.desc: 66 million years ago, an asteroid slammed into Mexico’s Yucatán Peninsula, causing a dinosaur mass extinction. What's in store for humanity if it happens again?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: Hayabusa2 just became the first spacecraft to take subsurface samples of an asteroid. How did they do it?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 Search for Our Sun's Lost Planet
programme.desc: Is it possible that there is a hidden planet within our own solar system? New evidence suggests that the fabled Planet X, or Planet 9, may indeed exist… but where?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E53 Saturn: The Moon King
programme.desc: The latest developments in space technology continue to reveal the wonders of our solar system. With new moons recently spotted orbiting Saturn, the gas giant has taken the lead in our cosmic neighborhood's moon count.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E56 Mars Perseverance: The Hunt Begins
programme.desc: Watch as the Mars Perseverance Rover makes its historic landing on the Red Planet. We take you inside the harrowing February 18, 2021 landing and its science mission.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: This is an inside look at NASA's groundbreaking Artemis Program, the spacecraft, and the people who will bring humanity one step closer to the moon, Mars, and beyond.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E72 Capturing A Black Hole In Our Milky Way
programme.desc: Astronomers linked radio dishes around the world to create the “Event Horizon Telescope” and have utilized this tool to photograph a supermassive black hole.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E74 First Images: The James Webb Telescope
programme.desc: The dawn of a new era in astronomy has begun as the world gets its first look at the full capabilities of NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Sailing to the Stars
programme.desc: Solar sails, the latest in space travel technology, could one day help us reach nearby stars. Follow the exciting missions laying the ground towards a new form of space exploration.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: On the 50th Anniversary of Apollo 13, Commander Jim Lovell and Apollo engineers recall the ingenuity and superhuman efforts that turned a space flight disaster into an extraordinary fight for survival.

programme.desc: Andrew Wommack shares religious messages about God's Word and discusses how he believes in God's power and his profound teachings.

programme.desc: Pastor Larry Huch instructs viewers on how to enter into a realm of blessing and revelation through the studies of the Jewish roots of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Jesus the Healer with Nancy Dufresne
programme.desc: Host Nancy Dufresne shares messages addressing the topics of faith, healing, renewing the mind, following the Holy Spirit and a life in Christ.

programme.title: Kenneth Copeland
programme.desc: Kenneth and Gloria Copeland teach principles of victorious Christian living through the uncompromising Word of God.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit.

programme.title: Sid Roth's It's Supernatural!
programme.desc: Messianic-Jewish host Sid Roth features a wide array of guests who have experienced divine visitations, deliverance and other supernatural events.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Watch Rick Renner's in-depth, engaging Bible teaching, using the Greek text to help listeners gain new insight from God's Word.

programme.title: Ministry Now
programme.desc: On the frontlines of today's new normal, the Lamb family leads viewers around the world with radical faith, encouraging declarations, and positive advice.

programme.title: Drenda
programme.desc: Drenda Keesee brings a new viewpoint on what it means to be a woman in today's world and tackles the greatest concerns that presently affect women.

programme.title: Love a Child
programme.desc: Missionaries work to share hope and spread the message of God's love by feeding and educating over 5,000 orphaned children who live in extreme poverty in Haiti.

programme.title: The Jewish Jesus
programme.desc: Rabbi Schneider becomes vulnerable in sharing a story about his sickness and healing, revealing what God taught him about true healing and enduring faith.

programme.title: Today with Marilyn and Sarah
programme.desc: Marilyn Hickey and Sarah Bowling spread practical messages from the Bible, with appearances from inspirational guests and reports from around the world.

programme.title: Voice of God with Joseph Z
programme.desc: How to stand firm on the eternal truths of Scripture when everything else shifts, letting God's Word be your constant compass.

programme.title: Amazing Facts with Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Although the exact hour of Christ's return cannot be known, those who study the Bible can learn to recognize the signs.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Watch Rick Renner's in-depth, engaging Bible teaching, using the Greek text to help listeners gain new insight from God's Word.

programme.title: Believers' Walk of Faith with Bill Winston
programme.desc: Bill Winston delivers the gospel of Jesus Christ worldwide, enabling people to know Christ and become stronger Christians.

programme.title: PSB Prophetic Sound Broadcast with Shawn Baker
programme.desc: Pastor Shawn Baker challenges any and all to get closer to God and to learn how to embrace the life that He has prepared for every single person.

programme.title: Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr. David Jeremiah, senior pastor of Shadow Mountain Community Church in El Cajon, Calif., delivers the unchanging Word of God to an ever-changing world.

programme.title: Healing Time with Dr. Doug Weiss
programme.desc: Dr. Weiss discusses the common issue of parents when faced with a challenging child, giving insights into two categories that these children can fall into.

programme.title: Jewish Voice with Jonathan Bernis
programme.desc: Jonathan Bernis and Jewish Voice Ministries help the Abandoned Jews of Ethiopia.

programme.title: Manna-fest with Perry Stone
programme.desc: Perry Stone provides a program dealing with the predictive and sensible studies of God's Word, helping to get a better understanding of biblical prophecy.

programme.desc: Andrew Wommack shares religious messages about God's Word and discusses how he believes in God's power and his profound teachings.

programme.title: The Journey
programme.desc: After 40 years of "The Troubles" in Northern Ireland the leading players meet at St. Andrews to try and hammer out a final and lasting peace agreement.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life.

programme.title: Céline
programme.desc: Céline tells the unforgettable love story of one of the most compelling celebrity couples of all time and chronicles the rise to fame of the world's greatest pop superstar.

programme.title: Rules Don't Apply
programme.desc: An aspiring young actress and her ambitious young driver struggle hopefully with the absurd eccentricities of the wildly unpredictable billionaire Howard Hughes, for whom they work.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Academy Award® winner Russell Crowe stars as Noah, a man chosen by God for a great task before an apocalyptic flood destroys the world.

programme.title: The Promise
programme.desc: It is 1914. As the Great War looms, the mighty Ottoman Empire is crumbling. Constantinople, the once vibrant, multicultural capital on the shores of the Bosporus, is about to be consumed by chaos.

programme.title: Surprised by Oxford
programme.desc: Caro, a brilliant but emotionally guarded American student, arrives at the prestigious Oxford University with the sole focus of attaining her PhD.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: Eric Lomax was one of thousands of Allied prisoners of war forced to work on the construction of the Thai/Burma railway during WW2. Years later, he met Patti and fell in love. Discovering that the young Japanese officer who haunted her husband was still alive, she faced a terrible decision.

programme.title: 20th Century Women
programme.desc: Set in 1970s Santa Barbara, 20th Century Women is the story of Dorothea (Annette Bening), a single mother, and her son Jamie, as he comes of age at a time brimming with cultural change and rebellion.

programme.title: The Big Short
programme.desc: When the banks committed the greatest fraud in US history, four outsiders risked it all to take them down. Based on the unbelievable true story and best-selling book from the author of The Blind Side and Moneyball, critics are calling The Big Short “brilliant and explosive”...

Tolly soon finds that he can pass through time to witness the family stories Grandmother Oldknow tells him.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: Ex-felon, Eugene Brown, establishes a Chess Club for inner city teenagers in Washington, D.C.

programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.
