programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Mary lives in a home filled with lovely things and loneliness. Bothered by bratty brother Max and neglected by well intentioned, but distracted, parents, she yearns for companionship. On Christmas Eve, Mary's Uncle Albert arrives with the gift of a wooden nutcracker doll…

programme.title: Adventure Mouse
programme.desc: Dreaming of adventure, city mouse Gamba joins a crew of Ship Mice ready to set sail - just as young Chuta bursts in, pleading for help. Stowing away on a boat, the gang heads for Dream Island to defend Chuta's family of mice against Noroi the White Weasel and his wicked weasel clan.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: When the children of the world start to disappear, the spies uncover a sinister television show and a host who is training the children to take over the adult world. In a b-story, Clover somehow has to complete her mission while being grounded to her bedroom.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The girls are assigned babysitting duty at the White House for the President’s 11-year-old daughter, Madison. At first Madison seems to be a perfect angel, but, as soon as her dad is out of sight, she turns into a major brat.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Ariel is the leader of W.O.W. – “Women of Wrestling”, a vicious wrestling troop made up of a race of ancient, deadly, tall, and strong warriors!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies’ old nemesis, Mr. Sebastian, is holding extreme underground raves in Beverly Hills. At the raves, his specially engineered music is inciting the ravers to destroy whatever venue they are having the rave in or at.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: When the spies find out that Tad Baily, one of their favorite soap opera stars, is missing -– they freak! They call Jerry and demand to be WOOHPed. Jerry, of course, tells them that finding Tad hardly qualifies as an international crisis, let alone a WOOHP mission.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: A new agency of super spies who call themselves SPI (Super Protection International) keep beating Sam, Alex, and Clover to the scene of major international crimes. Each time, the members of SPI save the day just as the Spies arrive. They take all the credit and are getting a lot of publicity.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: A sinister zoologist, appalled by the world's treatment of zoo animals, devises a scheme to increase animal intelligence in hopes of making them the dominant species of the world. It's up to the spies to stop the villain and the animals before they put all humans in cages.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies are sent into the woods to investigate a missing film crew only to find that an evil botanist has engineered giant, intelligent, venus flytrap-like trees that feed on humans. The girls must battle the evil trees and free the missing people from their pods before they’re “digested!”

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: When Alex screws up on several WOOHP missions, she begins to seriously doubt her spying abilities. Then, when Jerry introduces the girls to Britney -– a pretty, smart, sweet, spy-in-training who’s been assigned to help them on their next mission -- Alex only feels worse.

programme.title: 100% Wolf
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin is the heir to a proud family line of werewolves. Desperate to become a werewolf himself, Freddy is in for a shock when on his 14th birthday his first transformation goes awry, turning him into a ferocious - poodle.

programme.title: Pinocchio
programme.desc: Live-action adaptation of the beloved story of a wooden puppet named Pinocchio who magically comes to life.

programme.title: The Little Alien
programme.desc: When a little alien named Britney crashes her spaceship on planet Earth, 11-year-old Allan enlists the help of his UFO-obsessed neighbour. Together they must hatch a plan to get Britney back to outer space before it's too late.

programme.title: Ratchet & Clank
programme.desc: Get ready for an action adventure of GALACTIC PROPORTIONS! Ratchet is the last of his kind, a foolhardy Lombax who grew up without a family. Clank is a pint-sized robot with more brains than brawn.

programme.title: R.A.D.A.R.: The Adventures of the Bionic Dog
programme.desc: A boy and his dog with bionic powers save a small town from two bumbling crooks.

programme.title: Adventure Mouse
programme.desc: Dreaming of adventure, city mouse Gamba joins a crew of Ship Mice ready to set sail - just as young Chuta bursts in, pleading for help. Stowing away on a boat, the gang heads for Dream Island to defend Chuta's family of mice against Noroi the White Weasel and his wicked weasel clan.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.title: Pets 2
programme.desc: Best buddies, Bella the laid-back cat, Bagel the goofy dog, and Alvin the opinionated parrot are hanging out on their cherished couch watching the best show on TV, Pets! Bella is particularly excited because today’s episode of Pets is all about the coolest and most mysterious pet around: the cat!

programme.title: Firehouse Dog
programme.desc: Hollywood's most pampered pooch gets lost during a commercial shoot and ends up as the mascot for a local fire station.

programme.title: Tomorrow's Game
programme.desc: On the day of his Uncle's ascendance into the Hall of Fame, Daniel is forced to embark on a journey through time that sees him restore his family's legacy and rewrite baseball history.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: 100% Wolf
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin is the heir to a proud family line of werewolves. Desperate to become a werewolf himself, Freddy is in for a shock when on his 14th birthday his first transformation goes awry, turning him into a ferocious - poodle.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie: Dreamtopia is an all-new magical, make-believe world imagined by Chelsea, Barbie’s youngest sister. Join Chelsea and her puppy Honey as they swim through rainbow rivers with beautiful mermaids and fly through cotton candy clouds with fairies.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Mephisto and Praxina decide to get oracle gems the exact same way the princesses do, by helping people. But they’re lousy at it… and decide to make a monster that will put people in danger, thus requiring those people to be “helped”.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: When Amaru disappears, the princesses fear the worst… but it turns out Amaru has fallen for and followed a cute puppy (named Snowflake) belonging to Missy’s cousin Avery. Unfortunately, the Evil Twins have seen this, and tricked Amaru into following a fake version of Snowflake created by them.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: The princesses come upon an adorable kitten who needs a home, and bring him to their house, much to Amaru’s consternation. Despite his warnings, the princesses think he’s just jealous. But Amaru’s right; there’s something wrong with this adorable kitten.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Auriana wins a modeling contract for a Rose Red shampoo, which pays her with a lifetime supply of their shampoo.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Iris’s Aunt Ellen gives her a gift of a magical crystal that was in the basket when Iris was left on her front porch. The crystal is a messaging device, and the message is from her mother, warning her to stay out of the fight against Gramorr! She must stay safe, for the sake of Ephedia.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Between music and magic, Iris has no time for Nathaniel, and he’s noticed. But she refuses to admit it, stubbornly trying to keep a date with him while helping the most recent person in need, Brenda, a teen girl who showed up to Sunny Bay to find her biological mother.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: As the Princesses fly off on Amaru to save Brenda, Nathaniel, stunned by the sight, follows. The Princesses find Brenda as prisoner of the evil Twins and confront them.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Mephisto casts a spell at Iris that’s supposed to diminish her power, but accidentally hits Lyna with it, and it looks like she disappears! But actually, she was shrunken to doll-size, and taken by a young girl, Jessica who thinks she really is a doll.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Carissa goes against Talia’s express instructions and tries casting a spell she doesn’t know – a multiplier spell - and accidentally splits Amaru into three different versions of himself, with three wildly different personalities: Aggressive, Hungry, and Skittish.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Pets 2
programme.desc: Best buddies, Bella the laid-back cat, Bagel the goofy dog, and Alvin the opinionated parrot are hanging out on their cherished couch watching the best show on TV, Pets! Bella is particularly excited because today’s episode of Pets is all about the coolest and most mysterious pet around: the cat!

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: The world famous singing pre-teen chipmunk trio return to contend with the pressures of school, celebrity, and a rival female music group known as The Chipettes.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie: Dreamtopia is an all-new magical, make-believe world imagined by Chelsea, Barbie’s youngest sister. Join Chelsea and her puppy Honey as they swim through rainbow rivers with beautiful mermaids and fly through cotton candy clouds with fairies.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: Chipwrecked
programme.desc: The vacationing Chipmunks and Chipettes are turning a luxury cruise liner into their personal playground, until they become "chipwrecked" on a remote island.

programme.title: Adventure Mouse
programme.desc: Dreaming of adventure, city mouse Gamba joins a crew of Ship Mice ready to set sail - just as young Chuta bursts in, pleading for help. Stowing away on a boat, the gang heads for Dream Island to defend Chuta's family of mice against Noroi the White Weasel and his wicked weasel clan.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: Pinocchio
programme.desc: Live-action adaptation of the beloved story of a wooden puppet named Pinocchio who magically comes to life.

programme.title: R.A.D.A.R.: The Adventures of the Bionic Dog
programme.desc: A boy and his dog with bionic powers save a small town from two bumbling crooks.

programme.title: Pets 2
programme.desc: Best buddies, Bella the laid-back cat, Bagel the goofy dog, and Alvin the opinionated parrot are hanging out on their cherished couch watching the best show on TV, Pets! Bella is particularly excited because today’s episode of Pets is all about the coolest and most mysterious pet around: the cat!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies are sent to England to investigate abrupt changes in important people’s personalities. What they discover is that an evil psychiatrist, Dr. Gray, is “switching” the personalities of his patients so that they can stop complaining and learn to “walk in each others’ shoes.”

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies class ski trip turns into a disaster when Mandy ends up being the girls’ roommate. To make matters worse, an old nemesis, Dr. Gelee, from the “Ice Man Commeth” episode, breaks out of jail and tries to do the spies in.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies are called away from a movie date-night at the mall to stop an intruder at the nearby Internal Office Of Information. When they attempt to stop the bad guy from stealing important government documents, he tricks them into following him into the building’s elevator.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: When mysterious new computerized dating booths start to show up at various hangouts around Beverly Hills, Sam and Alex think it might be a fun way to find dates for the upcoming school dance.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Sam wins a spot on the hot new game show, “The Main Brain.” The girls blame her easy defeat on stage fright – that is, until the following day, when Sam begins to lose her memory.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Fashion Designer Helga Von Guggen (from “Wild Style”) is back -- and this time she wants revenge. With “Mystique,” her new line of hip clothing, she plans on “squeezing” her way back to the top of the fashion industry heap – literally.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: A high-tech toy manufacturer uses military microchips to make his action figure toys more realistic. Unintentionally the toys start to think for themselves and are bent on world domination. In a B-story, Clover gets a new boy toy who caters to her every whim.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.sub-title: S2:E1 A Spy Is Born Part II
programme.desc: The evil filmmaker Lumiere kidnaps Alex and forces Clover and Sam to star in his new spy movie if they ever want to see her alive again. Sam and Clover must unravel a series of clues and dodge danger while Lumiere films them. In the b-story, Sam tries to uncover the mystery of her “secret admirer.”

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies travel to Egypt to investigate strange occurrences at a pyramid. They unravel an evil archaeologist’s plot to resurrect an ancient Egyptian curse that would give the man eternal power as well as the ability to summon mummies as his minions.

programme.title: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Mary lives in a home filled with lovely things and loneliness. Bothered by bratty brother Max and neglected by well intentioned, but distracted, parents, she yearns for companionship. On Christmas Eve, Mary's Uncle Albert arrives with the gift of a wooden nutcracker doll…

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: A Tooth Fairy Tale
programme.desc: In a magical land divided by tradition, a rebellious tooth fairy and a daring goblin girl join forces on an epic quest to unite the kingdom!

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson makes some noise in TVR's new T350, a £40,000 coupe which promises 175mph, and 4 seconds to 60. Plus we find the ultimate bargain car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests he BMW M5, by driving from the UK to the famous Pau circuit in the South of France. Tom Ford tests the world's maddest car - the Ariel Atom.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: We pit the Ford Sierra Cosworth and the Mercedes 190E Cosworth against each other. Tim in London investigates the new craze of car share clubs. Tiff drives the brand new Nissan 370Z around what used to be one of the fastest race circuits in Europe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki tests the Mercedes Vito X or the VW Transporter Sportline on the track to find out which is quickest. Jonny embarks on the 600 mile transcontinental trip in the BMW 635d. Tom drives the ultimate 4x4, the 12 tonne, 10 foot tall Unimog.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato races two estates head to head. Vicki Butler-Henderson pits the new Pro-Ceed against the VW Golf. Jonny Smith picks up an amazing luxury car for £1000 or less. Tiff Needell runs Fifth Gear's most exciting car v bike race to date.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if an old Daihatsu Charade is the toughest car you can buy; Tom Ford drives the Honda CRV, the SUV that claims to be greener than a MINI Cooper.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: What do you think is more dangerous - driving whilst being drunk, or driving whilst being tired? Tiff Needell spends a day in the pub and Quentin Willson deprives himself of sleep for 2 days.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason takes two sporty convertibles - the Mini Cooper Cabriolet and Mazda MX-5 onto the track for a hair-do busting shootout. Tim Shaw heads to a garage...with no mechanics! Tiff spends some quality time in the brand new Aston Martin V12 Vantage.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford takes puts the Grande Punto Abarth through its hot hatch paces. Tim Shaw finds out if it's possible to save huge amounts of money by servicing your car yourself. Bruno Senna joins the programme as a special guest presenter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of we're literally taking Fifth Gear to new heights and celebrating the most spectacular challenge petrol-heads have ever invented.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson jets off to Portugal to drive the new Mazda MX5. It's the best selling sportscar in the world, but have Mazda fixed something that wasn't broken.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason pits the brand-new Renault Sport Clio 200 against a tough competitor from the past - the Renault Clio 182 Cup. Retired Formula One driver, and current TV pundit David Coulthard, meets up with Tiff Needell for an extreme van driving challenge

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki takes the Focus RS and the Escort Cosworth to find out once and for all which handles best around a track. Jason drives the Grand Tourer and delivers his verdict whether the £78,000 asking price would represent money well spent.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests the latest car to join the elite ranks of road cars capable of over 200mph includes such mouthwatering prospects as the Enzo Ferrari, the Pagani Zonda, and the Porsche Carerra GT .

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson has a mini-moto race against some of the biggest names in bike racing; Tom Ford tests the new Land Rover Freelander on Britain's most remote school run.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff tests this grand tourer's handling through the dramatic scenery of Snowdonia in Wales. Jason Plato tests the brand new £115,000 Aston Martin DB9 Volante, one of the fastest cabriolets on sale today.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests a comprehensive selection of the latest hot hatches including the new and long-awaited Ford Focus RS. He rules out the MGZR, the Mini Cooper S and the Renault Clio Cup.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes on a rather expensive road trip - in a £250,000 Rolls Royce Phantom. Tom Ford is testing the new Porsche Cayenne Turbo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff indulges in an end of term treat a classic Fifth Gear shootout, featuring some classic hot hatches from the 1980s. Tim investigates the great diesel versus petrol debate. Jonny visits his idea of automotive hell at the Firecracker Banger meet.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford and Jonny Smith enter a demolition derby in two unlikely vehicles, Reliant Robins. Tiff Needell tests the latest Porsche 911, the GT3RS. Vicki Butler-Henderson drives the new Vauxhall VXR8.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this special episode of the programme we reveal the winners of the Fifth Gear Awards 2006. There will be prizes for Best Small Car, Best Family Car, Best Fast Car and the overall Car of the Year.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato tests the new 911 Turbo, Vicki Butler-Henderson presents a high speed crash test, and Tom Ford drives a new Lamborghini.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell has a tough assignment. Our selfless road tester has to fly to Nice to drive the ultimate Mercedes-Benz, the flagship of the range, the £120,000 plus CL65.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear will be testing three of the most economical cars on the market. There's the petrol-powered Daihatsu Charade and the diesel-powered Citroen C2 and the "hybrid" Toyota Prius.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and new boy Ben Collins - the driver who used to be The Stig perform a two wheel driving stunt, Vicki Butler-Henderson puts the radical new four door Mini Countryman through its paces, Tiff Needell races two fast but green coupes head to head.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff conducts a crash test to show why everyone should make sure their next car has electronic stability control. Vicki is at a motor show in Monte Carlo, where she reveals the latest Pagani hypercar and test drives the controversial Fisker Karma.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this episode Tiff Needell and Jason Plato take the new Ford Mustang and Chevrolet Camaro on track to find out if the Americans are now producing performance cars us Brits should be taking notice of.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and Jason try to find a decent new car for just £10,000. Vicki checks out the new Lamborghini Urus, and the team find the biggest BMW ever made, the new X7.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason rips through Italy in the brand-new Gallardo Superleggera. Vicki gets under the skin of the new Nissan Cube. Jonny examines Volvo's S80 DRIVe with the help of a yacht. Tiff and Jason do battle in the R8 Spyder and Porsche 911 Turbo Cabriolet.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and Vicki review two mighty 4x4's in one of the shows muddiest Dog Fights. Elsewhere, the team hit the road in the all-new Alpine A110 to find out what's changed since the first incarnation hit our streets back in 1961.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests a new estate car from Ferrari, Vicki Butler-Henderson puts two luxurious diesels saloons against each other on the track.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason is joined by ex-Ferrari F1 driver Mika Salon to pit the brand new £100,000 Mercedes C63 AMG Black Series against its key rival from BMW. Tiff celebrates the iconic Ferrari F40's 25th birthday with a track drive of one of the best in the world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Italy testing the most powerful Ferrari ever made, the brand new 730bhp F12berlinetta, to the limit. Tiff and Jason are at the track with the two cheapest hot hatches on sale - the Suzuki Swift and Renault Sport Twingo.

programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson learns the skills needed to drive in the Special Forces, from former Royal Marine sniper Aldo Kane.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Antonio "Junior" Silva has dominated every one of his fights. Eric Pele may be the underdog, but he's riding his own winning streak. It's an earthquake when a 32-pound unstoppable force meets a 300-pound unmovable object. Roger Gracie is already at the top of the heap in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu and submission wrestling, now he's fighting MMA for the first time. He puts his reputation on the line as he faces Ron Waterman.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Vanessa Bellegarde as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH

This episode features the exhilarating matchup of Keegan ""The Condition"" Oliver vs. pro debut Derek ""Manchild"" Falk. This is followed by the entertaining contest of Aaron ""Vanilla Gorilla"" Gallant vs. Mike O'Neil, and the first Welterweight Title Defense for Sergej ""El Dorado"" Juskevic as he takes on challenger Lorawnt-T Nelson.

programme.title: Fight Vault - HK36 - Episode 2

programme.title: OUT OF THE CAGE

programme.desc: Ryan Dickson wants to be known for training harder than anyone else in the MMA world. When he takes on American CJ Marsh at HK35, Ryan knows he must bring his best Jiu Jitsu game to the fight in order to be victorious.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. With top match making throughout the fight cards, they have been touted as some of the biggest and toughest fights in the UK. Shock N Awe consistently delivers hard hitting action, also going one step further by adding in the personalities from MC Ricky Wright, Ring Girls Poppy and Alex and as well as the huge UK fight teams!

programme.desc: Only the Mehtas, Janet and Gerald know thus far that Raj cancelled his wedding with only the latter two knowing he did so because he is still in love with Janet.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma is mistaken for a server at a school event for Janet. Appa takes up math tutoring to prove his teaching prowess. Meanwhile, Shannon is finally single but isn't sure if Jung will make a move.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Janet plans to get the Kim family together for their first family dinner in 15 years, but it almost proves too much for Jung and Appa to handle.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Janet considers a new tattoo. Jung and Shannon exchange five-week-iversary gifts. Umma and Appa discover some juicy gossip about Pastor Nina.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa eavesdrops on Gerald and Chelsea getting together to tell a lie to her parents. Appa says that he knows whenever Janet has told a lie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Janet is commissioned to take portraits of Shannon's cats. Umma entrusts Jung to pick Appa up from the dentist, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma reevaluates her role as a mother. Appa comes into money and tries to do a good thing with it. Jung and Shannon discover they have different concepts of sexy.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Makarska
programme.desc: In Makarska, where the Biokovo mountain meets the sea, we explored local flavors with chef Mario Tomaš. On the menu: "utisno" shark, a Venetian-influenced specialty, and njokada—a cinnamon-spiced twist on pašticada.

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Spain, a vibrant Mediterranean land of resilience, culture, and unshakable identity.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Italy Tradition and Trends
programme.sub-title: Whats On Italy Tradition and Trends
programme.desc: At the heart of the Mediterranean, Italy’s event calendar comes alive through the Mediterranea Metal Cruise at sea, the innovation-driven SIGMA Rome, the Med Film Festival and MedFilm Festival celebrating Mediterranean cinema, and the Cous Cous Fest, where food becomes a symbol of cultural exchange.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Chryso Lefou prepares savory stuffed vine leaves, a classic Mediterranean favorite. She also makes a sweet banana cake drizzled with honey and tahini, combining traditional flavors with a touch of indulgence. A delightful episode celebrating the best of Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Spain, a vibrant Mediterranean land of resilience, culture, and unshakable identity.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Property in the Med
programme.sub-title: Panel AI Vr and Tech in Real Estate
programme.desc: From artificial intelligence to virtual reality, technology is redefining how real estate is designed, marketed, and sold. This panel explores how AI-driven insights, immersive VR experiences, and emerging digital tools are streamlining decisions, enhancing buyer confidence, and creating smarter, more competitive property markets—reshaping the future of real estate in the Mediterranean and beyond.

programme.title: Med Minds 03 Cleopatra
programme.desc: Cleopatra, the last Pharaoh of Egypt, captivated empires with her intelligence, charm, and enduring influence.

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Spain, a vibrant Mediterranean land of resilience, culture, and unshakable identity.

programme.title: Med Minds 06 Jean de Valette
programme.desc: Jean Parisot de Valette, the steadfast Grand Master of Malta, led the Knights with courage, defended his island, and saved Europe as we know it.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
programme.sub-title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
programme.desc: Calabria, a land steeped in myths, reveals its secrets through the Riace Bronzes. Restorer Cosimo Schepis shares the story of these ancient treasures, 50 years after their discovery. Actress Swamy Rotolo and her sister Grecia journey through Calabria, uncovering its hidden gems. A captivating exploration of the myths and legacy of Magna Grecia.

programme.title: MED Destination VENICE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: In Milan we'll take a peek at Italy's highest fashion, fanciest delis, grandest cemetery, and greatest opera house...not to mention Leonardo's "Last Supper." Then we'll cruise Lake Como, settling down in the lakeside village of Varenna.

programme.title: Whats On Malta Culture and Celebration
programme.sub-title: Whats On Malta Culture and Celebration
programme.desc: Malta’s event scene brings together style, sound, and large-scale spectacle, from the industry showcase of the Malta Trade Fair to the international flair of Malta Fashion Week. Music takes centre stage at the Malta Jazz Festival and the global pop event Isle of MTV, highlighting the islands’ position as a vibrant hub for culture and live entertainment in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Athens
programme.desc: Malini explores the ancient city of Athens, Greece. Once steeped in history, Athens has experienced a modern rebirth, now thriving with creativity, modern Greek gastronomy, a vibrant contemporary art scene, and unmatched nightlife.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.desc: France, a defining force of the Mediterranean, where elegance, power, and culture have shaped Europe and the world.

programme.title: Malini Egypt
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Egypt for the first time, exploring Cairo and the Pyramids of Giza. Beyond the headlines and common tourist warnings, she discovers unexpected warmth, culture, and a different side to these iconic places.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Nations 01 Italy
programme.desc: Italy, the heart of the Mediterranean, where history, style, and passion shape a timeless nation.

programme.title: Io Ti Cerchero
programme.desc: Ex-cop Valerio Frediani is shaken by the sudden death of his estranged son Ettore, ruled a suicide. His former partner, Detective Sara, suspects foul play and urges him to question the case. Haunted by guilt, Valerio investigates and uncovers troubling inconsistencies. As grief turns to resolve, he’s determined to uncover the truth—wherever it leads.

programme.title: Buon compleanno Olly
programme.desc: Olivia turns 27, and her relatives organise a surprise party for her that involves friends and work colleagues. The sudden arrival of Francesco, a "forester", puts everything in torest: the party, the relationships and the woman's life.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Concerto per Milano 2022
programme.desc: The Filarmonica della Scala and principal conductor Riccardo Chailly return to Piazza Duomo for the evocative Concerto per Milano. A landmark cultural event, this open-air performance brings world-class music to the heart of the city. Television direction by Stefania Grimaldi captures the grandeur and emotion of the evening.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.desc: The tragic tale of Medea, a powerful sorceress betrayed by her lover, Jason. Consumed by rage and heartbreak, she enacts a devastating revenge. The story delves into love, betrayal, and the dark extremes of human emotion.

programme.title: PUCCINI TU TU PICCOLO ADDIO

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.sub-title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.desc: In this 2022 concert in Turin, Marc Albrecht conducts the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai, with Simone Lamsma as the violin soloist. The programme includes Shostakovich's Violin Concerto No. 1, showcasing Lamsma's technical brilliance and emotional depth, and Franck's Symphony in D minor, celebrated for its rich harmonies and cyclical structure. The performance highlights a powerful blend of passion and precision.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The spotlight falls on two traditional Cypriot favorites. First, we explore the art of preparing Oven Lamb Kleftiko, a slow-cooked dish where tender lamb is infused with herbs and baked to perfection, capturing the essence of village cooking. Then, the journey continues with Kattimeria, fried sweet flatbreads that balance crisp texture with a hint of indulgent sweetness. Together, these recipes showcase the comforting richness and variety of Cyprus’s culinary heritage.

programme.title: Panel Tokenizing Real Estate
programme.desc: Tokenization is transforming real estate by turning property into digital assets that can be bought, sold, and shared with unprecedented flexibility. programme.title: Orpheus
programme.sub-title: Greek Myths: Orpheus - A Hymn of Impossible Love
programme.desc: Explore the poignant tale of Orpheus, the legendary musician whose melodies could charm all living things. When his beloved Eurydice dies, Orpheus ventures into the Underworld to bring her back, defying death itself. His story is a timeless hymn to love, loss, and the power of art

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Luisi Malofeev Torino 2021
programme.desc: In May 2021, pianist Alexander Malofeev joined conductor Fabio Luisi and the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai for a performance at Turin's Auditorium RAI Arturo Toscanini. The program featured Franz Liszt's Piano Concerto No. 1 in E-flat major and Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 6 in B minor, "Pathétique." programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Scrab, The Ark and The Rock

With all the best intent, June offers Becky plenty of distraction from her family life. Fueled by her anger at G*d and loss of faith, Becky starts drinking and making other self-destructive choices. Jane eventually escaped when Casey was 6 years old. Timothy Fast was arrested and incarcerated. Ever since, Jane has struggled to regain a normal life for her and her daughter. For Casey, the memories of a childhood in captivity still haunt her. Jane, on the other hand, has seemingly moved on. She has re-married and is happy. When a number of local women start to go missing, Jane reveals to Casey that Timothy might have had an accomplice and wonders if he is involved. The kidnapping M.O. is eerily similar. When a number of local women start to go missing, Jane reveals to Casey that Timothy might have had an accomplice and wonders if he is involved. The kidnapping M.O. is eerily similar. Casey is furious that...

programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: As high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of a police car.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a black teenager

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When Andy answers a domestic disturbance call, the social worker turns out to be her estranged mother.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A gifted psychic (or a gifted conman) helps find the missing witness in an organized-crime case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of an escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator for lack of evidence.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides it_s time for his officers to get back on track.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Nick investigate a torched van. It belongs a street priest who's been receiving death threats.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: Lost in the Pacific
programme.desc: A luxury airline is making its maiden flight, with a group of VIP passengers on board, when disaster strikes. A mechanical failure forces the plane to crash land and it ends up on a remote Pacific island where passengers and crew must wait to be rescued.

programme.title: Strawberry Mansion
programme.desc: In the near future an unassuming dream tax auditor gets swept up in a cosmic journey through the life and dreams of an ageing eccentric.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: 10,000 Days
programme.desc: Ten thousand days ago, Comet 23 struck Earth with the magnitude of all the nuclear weapons in the world sending the planet into a deep freeze. Now, 27 years in the future, those who survived are locked in an epic battle of life or death.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by the innocence of those who live there, two young people become entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Max Winslow and the House of Secrets
programme.desc: Five teens are invited to the home of an eccentric billionaire to compete in a game to win his mansion. The night takes a dark turn when they become trapped in the house and are forced to face off against each other and an evil AI entity who controls everything in the house including their fate.

programme.title: Last Sentinel
programme.desc: Set in the future on a war-ravaged Earth, four soldiers man Sentinel – a remote military base in a vast ocean that separates two warring continents. They await the relief or the enemy, whichever comes first.

programme.title: Trancers
programme.desc: A gruff bounty hunter travels back in time to 1980s Los Angeles to stop a twisted criminal who can transform people into zombie-like creatures.

programme.title: Arcadia
programme.desc: In the not too distant future, the population has risen to dangerous numbers and a deadly disease has gripped the world. To combat the death toll rising, 'Arcadia' has been built as a safe disease-free haven for the privileged, where life expectancy is more than 130 years.

programme.title: Under The Crystal Sky
programme.desc: In the 1800s, in the American Southwest, an Indigenous family witness a UFO crash near their home. Following the extraterrestrial event, strange occurrences transpire around them. The family must confront their fear of the extraterrestrial while also fending off the encroaching American military.

programme.title: Invasion Planet Earth
programme.desc: When a gigantic, all-consuming alien mothership appears in the sky and launches a ruthless attack, the ultimate war for Planet Earth is about to begin...

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target.

programme.title: Tomorrow's Game
programme.desc: On the day of his Uncle's ascendance into the Hall of Fame, Daniel is forced to embark on a journey through time that sees him restore his family's legacy and rewrite baseball history.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: Tuck, Munch and Alex are a trio of inseparable friends who long for adventure. One day the boys find a cryptic signal on their phones and convinced that it is part of something bigger they set out on a quest to find the source.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Robot Riot
programme.desc: A group of soldiers awaken in an abandoned town with no memory, only to find they’re test subjects for giant battle robots controlled by a mad general. Trapped and outgunned, they must fight to survive and uncover the truth. Robot Riot is nonstop action.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As the human population nears extinction, vampires must capture and farm every remaining human, or find a blood substitute before time runs out. However, a covert group of vampires makes a remarkable discovery, one which has the power to save the human race.

programme.title: Altitude
programme.desc: Five teenage friends – including rookie pilot Sara (Jessica Lowndes of TV's 90210) – rent a small plane for a weekend getaway. But shortly into the flight, something suddenly goes wrong. The instruments begin to malfunction. The plane won’t stop climbing.

programme.title: Infinitum: Subject Unknown
programme.desc: In this mind-bending sci-fi, Jane must find a way to alter her reality before it is too late. Featuring Sir Ian McKellen.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic

programme.title: Earth to Echo

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she’s out for revenge.

programme.title: Boneless
programme.desc: On a business trip to Venice, a couple offers a ride to a mysterious hitchhiker. A wrong turn at the worst possible time will lead the protagonists into the middle of an intergalactic war between humans and aliens.

programme.title: Lost in the Pacific
programme.desc: A luxury airline is making its maiden flight, with a group of VIP passengers on board, when disaster strikes. A mechanical failure forces the plane to crash land and it ends up on a remote Pacific island where passengers and crew must wait to be rescued.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Meet Dave

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by the innocence of those who live there, two young people become entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.desc: Dust off your old posters as Alex relives 30 era-defining mega bangers that made high school legendary! Featuring Evanescence, No Doubt, Limp Bizkit, Wheatus & many more!

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Killer Cuts Of The 00s!

programme.title: Monsters of Rock! 1990-1999
programme.desc: A definitive 6 hour marathon of 90s guitar anthems! From U2 to INXS, Blur to Bon Jovi, Skunk Anansie to Green Day, Metallica to Iron Maiden - 70 rock classics are here, in order!

programme.title: Teenage Kicks: The Misfit Years
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Teenage Kicks: The Misfit Years
programme.desc: From angsty misfit anthems & teen rebellion, to non-conformers & pure emotional turbulence, these songs reminded us growing up that sometimes it's totally fine to feel different!

programme.title: Muse: Fan Favourites

programme.title: The Anthems!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's 30 Greatest Albums
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Nicky Horne's 30 Greatest Albums

programme.title: Rated Rock! The No.1s

programme.title: Big Hair & Power Chords!

programme.title: 99 Alt Rock Anthems

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: In this tightly crafted action thriller, a single mother struggling to survive agrees to run black market medical supplies in her legendary pick-up truck, "Night Train", with the FBI in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Winter Ridge
programme.desc: A young detective is torn apart after his wife ends up in a coma. Unable to accept her condition, he throws himself into a manhunt chasing a serial killer whose motives are connected to his wife.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: SURVIVOR is a gripping thriller about State Department employee Kate Abbott, newly posted in the American embassy in London. Kate is charged with stopping terrorists from getting into the U.S. which puts her directly in the line of fire.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: Set in New Orleans, this is the story of a mysterious man, Nick Easter. Nick gets himself not only on the jury of a landmark case against a gun manufacturer, but as the foreman, in an attempt to influence the other jury members to vote a certain way.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: A Dangerous Method
programme.desc: Drawn from true-life events, it takes a glimpse into the turbulent relationships between fledgling psychiatrist Carl Jung, his mentor Sigmund Freud and Sabina Spielrein, the troubled but beautiful young woman who comes between them.

programme.title: Sin City 2: A Dame to Kill For
programme.desc: In a town where justice doesn't prevail, the desperate want vengeance and ruthless murderers find themselves with vigilantes on their heels. Their paths cross in Sin City’s famous Kadie's Club Pecos.

programme.title: Street Kings
programme.desc: When evidence implicates a veteran LAPD cop in the execution of a fellow officer, he is forced to go up against the cop culture he's been a part of his entire career.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: The Iceman is the story of real-life mob hitman Richard "The Iceman" Kuklinski, who was reportedly responsible for over 200 murders. .

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: FAIR GAME is a riveting action-thriller based on the autobiography of real-life undercover CIA operative VALERIE PLAME (Naomi Watts), whose career was destroyed and marriage strained to its limits when her covert identity was exposed by a politically motivated press leak.

programme.title: The Cat's Meow
programme.desc: In 1924, media mogul William Randolph Hearst gathered some of the world's best known personalities for a trip of his yacht that resulted in a still-unsolved, hushed-up murder.

programme.title: Amish Abduction
programme.desc: Amish wife and mother Annie faces a crisis when her husband leaves the word of the Amish to live among “normal Americans,” or the “English” as the Amish dub them. But things turn even more dire when her husband returns, seeking custody of their son, and is willing to kill to achieve his goal…

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: John Skillpa, a quiet bank clerk living in tiny Peacock, Nebraska, prefers to live an invisible life. This might have to do with John’s secret: he has another personality no one knows about, a woman who each morning cooks him breakfast before he starts his day. Then, in a moment, everything changes.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: An Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: An Imperfect Murder is a cat and mouse thriller which will leave you guessing until the very end – staring Sienna Miller and Alec Baldwin.

programme.title: The Missing Sister
programme.desc: When Sharon finally tracks down her missing sister Raven, she’s elated to be back together – until she begins to suspect that Raven isn’t her sister at all, but rather an opportunistic imposter.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: In this tightly crafted action thriller, a single mother struggling to survive agrees to run black market medical supplies in her legendary pick-up truck, "Night Train", with the FBI in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Stunt Squad
programme.desc: The merchants of Bologna are victims of a cruel gang of racketeers. Commissioner Grifi organizes a special team.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: The Iceman is the story of real-life mob hitman Richard "The Iceman" Kuklinski, who was reportedly responsible for over 200 murders. .

programme.title: 13 Sins
programme.desc: Elliot Brindle is an ordinary office worker who’s bright, bored and drowning in debt. He receives a phone call informing him that he’s on a hidden camera game show, where he must execute 13 tasks to receive a sum total cash prize of $6.2M...

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: Set in New Orleans, this is the story of a mysterious man, Nick Easter. Nick gets himself not only on the jury of a landmark case against a gun manufacturer, but as the foreman, in an attempt to influence the other jury members to vote a certain way.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: FAIR GAME is a riveting action-thriller based on the autobiography of real-life undercover CIA operative VALERIE PLAME (Naomi Watts), whose career was destroyed and marriage strained to its limits when her covert identity was exposed by a politically motivated press leak.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Amusement Rides / Toy Store / Airport
programme.desc: Masha tries to get on to a ride that she is is too short and too young for. In the toy store, the Bear lets Masha pick only one toy.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Superpizza / Fashion / Well Sorted / Cinema / Scary Movie
programme.desc: Masha picks the most expensive pizza because she likes how it looks on the picture on the menu. Masha decided to have a fashion show! What is going on? Is Masha misbehaving? Is she being mischievous?

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Fast Food and Healthy Food / Dairy Shop / Behind the Glass / The Taming of The Shrew
programme.desc: Rose and the wolves are racing. In the dairy isle of the grocery store, Masha is doing a solo dance on top of the yogurt bottles. Masha is trying to figure out how the snack machine works.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Back to School / Bus Stop / Competition / Hugs
programme.desc: Masha is getting ready for school. Masha is trying to squeeze in a bus a stroller with her little baby Rose. Masha and the animals are dancing a Hawaiian dance.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Selfie / Dance, Dance / Roller-Skater / Modern Art / Picnic
programme.desc: Rose is trying to take a selfie, get many likes, and become more popular than her neighbours. Masha is dancing a modern dance with so much enthusiasm that all the animals decide to join her.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Come on Let's Share / Stylish Swim / Traffic Blues / February / March
programme.desc: What is the most satisfying thing to do with a big bowl of fresh and delicious cucumbers? Masha and Rose are going to the pool to swim. Panda is trying to teach Masha how to safely cross the road.

programme.title: Guess How Much I Love You

programme.title: Guess How Much I Love You

programme.title: Guess How Much I Love You

programme.desc: While exploring Osaka, Japan, the Super Pets accidentally get stuck in a giant flying carp streamer and rip a boy named Hiroto's own koinobori!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets meet a boy named Taehoon and his giant robot on Jeju Island in South Korea. Before a typhoon comes, Taehoon tries to help his father with his robot to harvest all the tangerines!

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Shattered Earth. Cloudy Mountain
programme.desc: A peaceful town turns into a living hell when a devastating earthquake is triggered, causing buildings to tumble and sinkholes to open. A retired railway soldier and his son, an explosives engineer, travel deep into a cave to rescue trapped survivors.

programme.title: The King Of Comedy
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Miracles: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: A country boy becomes the head of a gang through the purchase of some lucky roses from an old lady. He and a singer at the gang's nightclub try to do a good deed for the old lady when her daughter comes to visit.

programme.title: Down With Love
programme.desc: In 1963 New York, a female advice columnist who has sworn off love falls for a journalist-ladies' man who's decided to entrap her.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Girl Asleep
programme.desc: The world is closing in on Greta Driscoll. On the cusp of turning fifteen she can't bear to leave her childhood, it contains all the things that give her comfort in this incomprehensible new world.

programme.title: Dead Zone
programme.desc: An elite team of soldiers who, to stop the collapse of humanity, descend on a radiation-poisoned town and perform the ultimate stealth mission using high-tech armor and weapons.

programme.title: The Dreamers
programme.desc: The tumultuous political landscape of Paris in 1968 is the backdrop as three young cineastes are drawn together through their passion for film.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Two Los Angeles homicide detectives are dispatched to a northern town where the sun doesn't set to investigate the methodical murder of a local teen.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: Winter Ridge
programme.desc: A young detective is torn apart after his wife ends up in a coma. Unable to accept her condition, he throws himself into a manhunt chasing a serial killer whose motives are connected to his wife.

programme.title: Iron Fury
programme.desc: In 1944, a young lieutenant leads a courageous group of Russian soldiers in a German POW camp, plotting a daring escape from captivity in a half-dest

programme.title: Loving Vincent
programme.desc: Vincent Willem van Gogh is undoubtedly one of the most famous and influential figures in the history of Western art. Yet during his lifetime Vincent struggled with poverty and depression, dying at only 37 years old.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Ian McKellen stars in the classic tale of revenge that has stood the test of time, reimagined for the modern day as a psychological thriller.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner’s deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the Devil who slyly promises to do just that - for a price.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Miss Sloane
programme.desc: Elizabeth Sloane (Jessica Chastain – Zero Dark Thirty) is the most sought-after, formidable and ruthless lobbyist in D.C.

programme.title: Dead Zone
programme.desc: An elite team of soldiers who, to stop the collapse of humanity, descend on a radiation-poisoned town and perform the ultimate stealth mission using high-tech armor and weapons.

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: Nick Wild (Jason Statham) is a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal professional skills and a personal gambling problem. When a friend is beaten by a sadistic thug, Nick strikes back, only to find out the thug is the son of a powerful mob boss.

programme.title: Unsane
programme.desc: A young woman leaves her hometown to escape a troubled past and begin a new job. But when she is involuntarily committed to a mental institution she is confronted by her greatest fear - but is it real, or just her delusion?...

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Down With Love
programme.desc: In 1963 New York, a female advice columnist who has sworn off love falls for a journalist-ladies' man who's decided to entrap her.

programme.title: Rules Don't Apply
programme.desc: An aspiring young actress and her ambitious young driver struggle hopefully with the absurd eccentricities of the wildly unpredictable billionaire Howard Hughes, for whom they work.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: Shattered Earth. Cloudy Mountain
programme.desc: A peaceful town turns into a living hell when a devastating earthquake is triggered, causing buildings to tumble and sinkholes to open. A retired railway soldier and his son, an explosives engineer, travel deep into a cave to rescue trapped survivors.

programme.title: The King Of Comedy
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: Freeheld

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The story of the prolonged development and the initially troubled operational history of the Boeing B-29 Superfortress. Forever known as the airframe that dropped the first atomic weapons on Japan, the B-29 lived on well beyond its war years.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Vehicles That Liberated Europe

programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Bombs, Bridges And Tunnels
programme.desc: We examine the robot that defused bombs both on foreign battlefields and British streets, and an astonishing Gulf War minelayer

programme.desc: Armed with evidence from Odette, Vera intensifies her search at Karlsruhe prison and Ravensbruck, facing hurdles to uncover crucial results in Germany.

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: With Allied victories and the liberation of Paris following D-Day, Vera is in a race against time to locate her missing agents.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do The Brits Win Every War
programme.desc: Frenchman Fred Sirieix joins Al Murray to break down what really happened during the Napoleonic wars. Did Britain really win the battle of Waterloo?

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do The Brits Win Every War
programme.desc: Al joins forces with German comedian Henning Wehn to delve deeper into the truth behind some World War II myths.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Nazi Germany boasted that its locomotives were faster and more innovative. This programme examines that claim by looking at these ‘flying trains’.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Veterans and historians of the Thai-Burma railway tell the story of its construction. Built to supply Japan’s invasion of India, it cost thousands of lives – both POWs and Asian slave labourers.

programme.title: The Jewish Nazi?
programme.desc: The Jewish Nazi tells the remarkable story of a Jewish child who survives the Holocaust as the Nazi’s youngest soldier, hides his shocking secret in Australia for 50 years, has had four false identities, been wrongly 'reunited' with two long-lost families and now – thanks to a DNA breakthrough – discovers his true identity in the twilight of his life.

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Capture of a key Nazi uncovers shocking realities. Amid demands for accountability, as Vera and her team navigate murky waters to confront uncomfortable truths.

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Vera finds out her agents' fate. Her beliefs about Noor are challenged. Suspicions lead Vera to hunt down a Nazi mastermind.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Near the Czech border, a secret German site, "The Giant," tests The Bell, powered by Serum 525, turning all who touch it into rotting living zombies.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: 1942 and Hitler has the totally barking idea of using educated dogs to do a soldier's job. The Nazi leader wants to create fearsome canines to help him win the Second World War.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: The debate about humanity's true origins becomes a nefarious fixation as SS leader Heinrich Himmler turns his attention to proving the Paleolithic past of Germany's Aryan race.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: Runes are the letters of an ancient Germanic writing system that harkens back to a mythological age filled with heroes, magic, and mystery.

programme.desc: Armed with evidence from Odette, Vera intensifies her search at Karlsruhe prison and Ravensbruck, facing hurdles to uncover crucial results in Germany.

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: With Allied victories and the liberation of Paris following D-Day, Vera is in a race against time to locate her missing agents.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: A 23-year-old Hitler, living hand-to-mouth as a painter in Vienna, Austria, discovers a sacred spear in the city's Hofburg Museum.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: In 1943, the inmates of the Death Camp at Sobibor staged an organised rebellion against their Nazi oppressors.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Nazi Germany boasted that its locomotives were faster and more innovative. This programme examines that claim by looking at these ‘flying trains’.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do The Brits Win Every War
programme.desc: Frenchman Fred Sirieix joins Al Murray to break down what really happened during the Napoleonic wars. Did Britain really win the battle of Waterloo?

programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends
programme.desc: Chronicles Brie and Nikki's journey from waitresses to WWE Superstars.

programme.desc: Their on-screen rivalry inspired a revolution in sports entertainment.
